member.name: T:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer
member.summary: Base class for colorization implementations. The colorization can be run during the actual calculation (using only the iteration count and escaping z value) or after the calculation (with the possibiilty to do statistics over all iterated pixels).

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.BlackAndWhite
member.summary: A colorizer that uses for pixels inside the set and for pixels outside of the set.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.IterationRatioColorizer
member.summary: A colorizer that uses for pixels inside the set and a hue for the color of pixels outside of the set depending on the ratio of iterations needed to escape to the maximum iteration count. The escaping magnitude is also used for fine tuning.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.IterationModuloColorizer
member.summary: A colorizer that uses for pixels inside the set and the number of iterations needed to escape as the hue angle degrees for the color of pixels outside of the set. The escaping magnitude is also used for fine tuning.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.SetColor
member.summary: Gets the color to use for pixels inside the set.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new instance.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.Initialize(System.Drawing.Size,MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope,System.Int32)
member.summary: This method is called by the when calculation starts. Override this method to initialize your colorizer with the given , and . To keep your colorizer thread and usage safe, return your state and it will be provided as parameter to the other colorization methods.
member.param: The used raster resolution.
The scope in the complex plane that is analyzed.
The maximum number of iterations used by the .
member.returns: A state object that is passed on to colorization methods. It is recommended to use this way to pass state instead of keeping shared fields in your colorizer.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.Initialize(MandelbrotGenerator.IteratedPoint[],System.Object)
member.summary: This method is called by the when calculation has finished to initialize post calculation colorization. It is only called if this colorizer was created with set to true. Override this method to initialize your colorizer using the calculation result given in . To pass your analysis result on to the method, return it as state object from this method.
member.param: The result of the calculation. The array's size depends on the of the resolution parameter of the earlier called method. An elements index is row*width+column. See for details about the per pixel information.
The state object returned by the earlier called method.
member.returns: A state object that is passed on to . It is recommended to use this way to pass state instead of keeping shared fields in your colorizer.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.GetColor(System.Drawing.Point,MandelbrotGenerator.IteratedPoint,System.Object)
member.summary: This method is called by the to determine the color of an calculated pixel. The calculation result is stored in . See for details about information.
member.param: The raster pixel that should be colorized.
The result of the calculation for this pixel. See for details about the per pixel information
The state object returned by the earlier called or method..
member.returns: The color to use for the given pixel.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer.ConvertHsvToRgb(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Converts a hsv color information into a .
member.param: The hue of the color (0 to 360 degree).
The saturation of the color (0 to 1).
The value (intensity) of the color (0 to 1).
member.returns: The representing the hsv color values.

member.name: T:MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope
member.summary: Represents a rectangular scope in the complex plain, defined by its "lower left corner" () (that is, the point of the rectangle with the smallest real and imaginary values), and its "upper right corner" () (that is, the point of the rectangle with the greatest real and imaginary values).

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope.Mandelbrot
member.summary: The default scope for the Mandelbrot image creation. Ranging from -2 - 2i to 2 + 2i.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope.LowerLeft
member.summary: Gets the "lower left corner" of this complex rectangle. This is the point of the rectangle with the smallest real and imaginary values.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope.UpperRight
member.summary: Gets the "upper right corner" of this complex rectangle. This is the point of the rectangle with the greates real and imaginary values.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope.Real
member.summary: Gets the "width" of this complex rectangle. The difference of the real parts of and .

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope.Imaginary
member.summary: Gets the "height" of this complex rectangle. The difference of the imaginary parts of and .

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope.#ctor(System.Numerics.Complex,System.Numerics.Complex)
member.summary: Creates a new instance from the given coordinates. The coordinates must specify a non-empty positive rectangle in the complex plane. The and values of must be smaller than the respective values of .
member.param: The "lower left corner" of the scope. This is the point of the rectangle with the smallest real and imaginary values.
The "upper right corner" of the scope. This is the point of the rectangle with the greatest real and imaginary values.
member.exception: The scope coordinates are invalid. The real or imaginary part of are not smaller than the respective part of .

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope.Deconstruct(System.Double@,System.Double@,System.Double@,System.Double@)
member.summary: Deconstructs this into to tuples representing the lower left and upper right corners. Each tuple consists of two values representing the real and imaginary parts.
member.param: The real part of the lower left corner.
The imaginary part of the lower left corner.
The real part of the upper right corner.
The imaginary part of the upper right corner.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope.Equals(MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope)
member.summary: Compares two instances for equality.
member.param: The to test for equality with this instance.
member.returns: true if is not null and has equal and values.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope.FromValueTuple(System.ValueTuple{System.ValueTuple{System.Double,System.Double},System.ValueTuple{System.Double,System.Double}})
member.summary: Creates a instance from two tuples representing the lower left and upper right corners of the scope. Each tuple needs to consist of two values representing the real and imaginary parts.
member.returns: A new instance representing the scope defined by the given tuples.
member.exception: The scope coordinates are invalid. The real or imaginary part of the first tuple is not smaller than the respective part of the second tuple.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope.op_Implicit(System.ValueTuple{System.ValueTuple{System.Double,System.Double},System.ValueTuple{System.Double,System.Double}})~MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope
member.summary: Creates a instance from two tuples representing the lower left and upper right corners of the scope. Each tuple needs to consist of two values representing the real and imaginary parts.
member.returns: A new instance representing the scope defined by the given tuples.
member.exception: The scope coordinates are invalid. The real or imaginary part of the first tuple is not smaller than the respective part of the second tuple.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope.op_Equality(MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope,MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope)
member.summary: Compares two instances for equality.
member.param: Left operand.
Right operand.
member.returns: true if either and are null or both have equal and values.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope.op_Inequality(MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope,MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope)
member.summary: Compares two instances for inequality.
member.param: Left operand.
Right operand.
member.returns: true if either only or is null or both have inequal and values.

member.name: T:MandelbrotGenerator.IteratedPoint
member.summary: Represents the element in the sequence z[n+1] = z[n]*z[n] + c of a given number c and z[0] = 0 after iterations.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.IteratedPoint.C
member.summary: The seed of the sequence. This is the point in the complex plane for which the sequence's behaviour determines wether it belongs to the Mandelbrot set or not.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.IteratedPoint.Z
member.summary: The result of the iterations. This is the th element in the sequence. If its is greater than 2, the sequence diverges and does not belong to the Mandelbrot set. If it is less than or equal to 2, the sequence did not escape after iterations.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.IteratedPoint.Set
member.summary: Gets a value that indicates wether belongs to the Mandelbrot set. If the of is greater than 2, does not belong to the set and false is returned. If it is less than or equal to 2, is assumed to belong to the set and true is returned.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.IteratedPoint.Iterations
member.summary: The number of iterations calculated to this point.

member.name: T:MandelbrotGenerator.MandelbrotBitmapGenerator
member.summary: Creates a with the given resolution of the given section of the Mandelbrot set in the complex plane.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.MandelbrotBitmapGenerator.Progress
member.summary: Gets a value between 0 and 100 indicating the calculation progress in percent.

member.name: P:MandelbrotGenerator.MandelbrotBitmapGenerator.IsCancelled
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the calculation has been cancelled.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.MandelbrotBitmapGenerator.#ctor(MandelbrotGenerator.Colorizer.MandelbrotColorizer,System.Drawing.Size,MandelbrotGenerator.ComplexScope,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the .
member.param: The to use to colorize the calculation results for the bitmap.
The resolution of the raster and final bitmap.
The scope in the complex plane to analyze.
The maximum number of iterations after which an sequence can be considered convergent.
This value is used for the TPL via the property to control how the calculation is parallelized.
member.exception: has zero or negative values, or the is too small to be analyzed by this implementation.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.MandelbrotBitmapGenerator.CreateBitmapParallel
member.summary: Starts the calculation as a background task and returns the that can be used to await the resulting :
member.returns: A that can be used to wait for or await the resulting .
member.exception: This instance has already been disposed of.
This instance has already been used to generate a bitmap. An instance of can only be used once.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.MandelbrotBitmapGenerator.CreateBitmap
member.summary: Performs the calculation and returns the generated .
member.returns: The generated representing an approximation of the Mandelbrot set in the given scope and using the specified .
member.exception: This instance has already been disposed of.
This instance has already been used to generate a bitmap. An instance of can only be used once.

member.name: M:MandelbrotGenerator.MandelbrotBitmapGenerator.Cancel
member.summary: Cancels a running calculation.
